requirement_topic.en: Scope and Intended-Use Classification — Occupational Respirator vs Medical Mask Route
requirement_topic.zh: 范围与用途归类——职业防护口罩与医用口罩路径
requirement_topic.zht: 範圍與用途歸類——職業防護口罩與醫用口罩路徑

summary.en: Uganda applies use-based classification for this product type. Workplace filtering respirators with particulate protection claims are processed through UNBS technical routes adopting EN 149 classes FFP1, FFP2, and FFP3. Medical masks or surgical-use products are processed through the national health regulator route instead of the workplace respirator EN 149 path. If the model includes radio communication functions, regulatory review of telecom aspects is done under the UCC framework, while power accessories must match Uganda declaration context (240 V, 50 Hz).
summary.zh: 乌干达对本类产品采用用途归类原则。以工地和岗位防护为目的的过滤式呼吸器按UNBS技术路径处理，采用UNBS采纳的EN 149 FFP1、FFP2和FFP3类别。具有医用、外科或临床用途主张的口罩需改走国家卫生监管路径，而非EN149职业路径。若产品带有无线通信功能，应按UCC框架补充相关通信类声明，电气附件需符合乌干达声明背景（240 V、50 Hz）。
summary.zht: 烏干達對本類產品採用用途歸類原則。以工地及工作場所防護為目的的過濾式呼吸器按UNBS技術路徑處理，採用UNBS採納的EN 149 FFP1、FFP2及FFP3類別。具有醫用、外科或臨床用途聲明的口罩需改走國家衛生監管路徑，而非EN149職業路徑。若產品帶有無線通訊功能，應按UCC框架補充相關通信類聲明，電氣附件需符合烏干達聲明背景（240 V、50 Hz）。

standards_or_laws: UNBS product classification under workplace PPE framework and Ministry of Gender and Labour directives
National health regulator pathway for medical and surgical masks
Uganda Communications Commission (UCC) rules for radio-capable products
UNBS adoption of EN 149 classes (FFP1, FFP2, FFP3)

summary.en: China separates industrial respiratory products under GB 2626 and medical-protective masks under GB 19083 with corresponding certification tracks. This domestic split is structurally similar but does not determine Uganda scope automatically; Uganda depends on UNBS occupational classification and national health authority decisions for destination market placement.
summary.zh: 中国也将工业口罩按GB 2626与医用防护口罩按GB 19083分开管理，走不同的认证路径。该国内分类具有结构参考价值，但不能自动决定乌干达市场归类，乌干达以UNBS职业用途规则和国家卫生监管机关的目的地决定为准。
summary.zht: 中國也將工業口罩按GB 2626與醫用防護口罩按GB 19083分開管理，走不同的認證路徑。該國內分類具有結構參考價值，但不能自動決定烏干達市場歸類，烏干達以UNBS職業用途規則和國家衛生監管機關的目的地決定為準。

gap.en: The biggest gap is route selection before shipment. A model labelled for workplace wearer protection must be aligned to UNBS occupational evidence and EN 149 classes. Any clinical or surgical claims move the model to health-regulator controls. Wireless or radio claims add a separate UCC review, and incomplete routing declarations are common causes of return to shipper.
gap.zh: 最大差距是出货前未完成用途路由判断。以工人防护为导向的型号应对齐UNBS职业合规证据和EN 149分类。凡涉及临床或外科主张应转入卫生监管。具备无线/无线电功能则叠加UCC审查，不完整的路由声明是常见退货原因。
gap.zht: 最大差距是出貨前未完成用途路由判定。以工人防護為導向的型號應對齊UNBS職業合規證據和EN 149分類。凡涉及臨床或外科聲明應轉入衛生監管。具備無線／無線電功能則疊加UCC審查，不完整的路由聲明是常見退貨原因。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — destination-market classification by intended use must be documented and cannot mix occupational and medical routes without route-specific evidence.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 2626 and GB 19083 represent the two domestic Chinese routes but do not by themselves define Uganda destination scope.

source.publisher: UNBS and Uganda Ministry of Health/Ministry of Gender and Labour public notices

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda’s import route is use-dependent: occupational respirators follow UNBS occupational conformity and EN 149 class rules, while medical-mask claims follow the health regulator route, and radio features trigger UCC considerations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌干达的进口路径依赖用途判断：职业防护口罩走UNBS职业合规及EN 149类别要求，医用主张走卫生监管路径，具备无线功能还需考虑UCC。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏干達進口路徑依用途判定：職業防護口罩走UNBS職業合規及EN 149類別要求，醫用主張走衛生監管路徑，具備無線功能還需考慮UCC。
